svg.title: StudentLM system architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram showing onboarding, ingestion pipeline, knowledge graph, query engine, and student-facing output for a personalized study assistant

g.text: Student enters course regulation + year of study
Extracts subjects, semesters, credit weights, prerequisites
Nodes: concept units · Edges: prerequisite, co-requisite, revisit
Student uploads PDFs, notes, slides per subject · chunked, embedded, tagged with sem + subject
1. Classify query → identify target concept + sem
2. Graph traversal → find prerequisite concepts from earlier sems
3. Multi-namespace retrieval → pull chunks from each sem's vector store
Student ratings → reinforce strong prerequisite edges · flag wrong graph connections
